{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Eighth Division
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[The Eighth Division]] of the [[Abidan]] is currently made up of only three official members and a [[Judge]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[The Eighth Division]]'s reputation is currently in question.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
